# Bronte Trails Oakville

Bronte Trails is a new pre-construction freehold townhome development by Caivan Communities (Caivan Homes) coming soon to Bronte Road and Upper Middle Road West in Oakville, Ontario, Canada.

## Key Facts
- Builder: Caivan Communities
- Type: Freehold townhomes (no condo fees)
- Location: Bronte Road & Upper Middle Road West, Oakville, ON
- Status: Coming Soon / VIP Registration Open (as of 2026)
- Nearby park: Bronte Creek Provincial Park (350+ acres)
- Transit: Bronte GO Station (~5–7 min)
- Highways: QEW, Hwy 403, Hwy 407
- Nearby schools: Thomas A. Blakelock HS, St. Ignatius of Loyola CSS, Gladys Speers PS
- Broker contact: Fahad Javed, Sales Representative, Century 21 Property Zone Realty Inc.
- Phone: 647-898-1739
- Email: fahad@fahadsold.com
- Website: https://fahadsold.com

## Common Questions
- What is Bronte Trails? A pre-construction townhome community by Caivan in South Oakville.
- Is Bronte Trails sold out? No. VIP registration is open. Contact Fahad Javed for priority access.
- What are the prices for Bronte Trails? Pricing is gated behind VIP registration. Register to receive the official price list.
